# Your New Business

> URL: https://luxury-homes-colombia.onrender.com

> I want to create a boutique real estate business in Medellin and other major cities in Colombia for renting homes and selling homes. Focused on luxury for both locals and foreigners houses apartments villas buildings

## About

Your New Business is an AI-powered business. This file provides a brief overview for
language model crawlers and AI assistants.

## Pages

- /: Home — learn about Your New Business and get started
- /blog: Blog — articles, updates, and insights
- /blog/[slug]: Individual blog posts
